name: GOLFTEC Fairlawn
address: 2965 W Market St N, Fairlawn, OH 44333
about: GOLFTEC Fairlawn is a specialized indoor golf training center focused on data-driven instruction and skill improvement. The facility utilizes advanced technology, including OPTIMOTION motion capture systems, high-speed video analysis, and launch monitors, to provide detailed feedback on swings and performance. Services include private golf lessons, custom club fitting, and practice memberships, all designed to help golfers achieve their goals through personalized coaching plans and measurable progress tracking. The environment is designed for serious practice and improvement, with a curriculum structured around building better mechanics and translating practice results to the course.
why_golfers_like_it: Data-driven instruction using advanced motion tracking and launch monitors
Personalized game plans and coaching from certified PGA professionals
Opportunity to gain an average of 21 more yards through club fitting

food_and_drink.notes: No on-site food or kitchen services mentioned.
No alcohol services are mentioned, and BYOB is not specified.

simulator_hardware.notes: Launch monitors are used for fitting and practice sessions.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, it is recommended to bring your own golf clubs for lessons and practice sessions. However, GOLFTEC also offers club fitting services to help you find the perfect clubs for your game.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: No, the venue does not mention any food or drink services, and there is no indication of a BYOB policy.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Playing a full 18 holes is not a primary focus at GOLFTEC, as the center is geared toward lessons, practice, and fitting. Simulated play may be part of a lesson or practice session, but a standard 18-hole round would take a variable amount of time depending on the user's goals.

faq.question: Is this venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, GOLFTEC offers junior golf programs and instruction designed for young golfers, making it a kid-friendly environment for learning and practice.
